=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:5-4:10) TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStarFn.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldComplain = Effect.fn(function*(){
    return yield* Effect.fail("no"); // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldNotComplainRegularFn = Effect.fn((a: string) => {
    return Effect.fail(a)
})

export class Test {
    a: number = 42
    shouldComplain = Effect.fn({self: this}, function*(){
        yield* Effect.fail(this.a) // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
    shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")({self: this}, function* namedFn(){
        yield* Effect.fail(this.a) // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
}
export const shouldComplainNamedFnWithPipes = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
}, Effect.ignore)

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStarFn.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldComplain = Effect.fn(function*(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    return yield* Effect.fail("no"); // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldNotComplainRegularFn = Effect.fn((a: string) => {
    return Effect.fail(a)
})

export class Test {
    a: number = 42
    shouldComplain = Effect.fn({self: this}, function*(){
        yield* Effect.fail(this.a) // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
    shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")({self: this}, function* namedFn(){
        yield* Effect.fail(this.a) // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
}
export const shouldComplainNamedFnWithPipes = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
}, Effect.ignore)

=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStarFn.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldComplain = Effect.fn(function*(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldNotComplainRegularFn = Effect.fn((a: string) => {
    return Effect.fail(a)
})

export class Test {
    a: number = 42
    shouldComplain = Effect.fn({self: this}, function*(){
        return yield* Effect.fail(this.a); // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
    shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")({self: this}, function* namedFn(){
        yield* Effect.fail(this.a) // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
}
export const shouldComplainNamedFnWithPipes = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
}, Effect.ignore)

=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStarFn.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldComplain = Effect.fn(function*(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldNotComplainRegularFn = Effect.fn((a: string) => {
    return Effect.fail(a)
})

export class Test {
    a: number = 42
    shouldComplain = Effect.fn({self: this}, function*(){
        yield* Effect.fail(this.a) // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
    shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")({self: this}, function* namedFn(){
        return yield* Effect.fail(this.a); // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
}
export const shouldComplainNamedFnWithPipes = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
}, Effect.ignore)

=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStarFn.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldComplain = Effect.fn(function*(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldNotComplainRegularFn = Effect.fn((a: string) => {
    return Effect.fail(a)
})

export class Test {
    a: number = 42
    shouldComplain = Effect.fn({self: this}, function*(){
        yield* Effect.fail(this.a) // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
    shouldComplainNamedFn = Effect.fn("named")({self: this}, function* namedFn(){
        yield* Effect.fail(this.a) // <- should emit an error be return yield*
    })
}
export const shouldComplainNamedFnWithPipes = Effect.fn("named")(function* namedFn(){
    return yield* Effect.fail("no"); // <- should emit an error be return yield*
}, Effect.ignore)
